title: STZ-Induced Type 1 Diabetes Model Protocol
author: Jason Kim
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.xh8fj9w
materials: Monitor glucose level for onset of hyperglycemia.

steps.title: Administer an intraperitoneal injection of streptozotocin...
steps.instruction: Administer an intraperitoneal injection of streptozotocin (50 mg/kg body weight) daily for 5 days.
